name: tla_forall_always_implies_intensional_equality
reason: tla_forall_always_implies_equality2 is external_body forcing intensional equality of structurally distinct TempPred closures — the LHS nests forall inside always inside forall while the RHS nests forall inside implies inside always, and equating their pred fields conflates extensional with intensional identity

name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging the intensional gap between p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) (which goes through TempPred::new creating a fresh closure) and the direct implication — it silently resolves the closure-wrapping mismatch without proof

name: spec_entails_tla_forall_vacuous
reason: spec_entails_tla_forall allows an unsatisfiable spec (always false) to entail tla_forall of anything vacuously — while logically valid, this means any property can be "proven" under a contradictory spec without warning

name: always_implies_forall_intro_empty_type
reason: tla_forall over always(p implies true) is trivially valid for any p — combined with tla_forall_always_implies_equality2, this could equate a trivially-valid predicate with always(p implies tla_forall(const_true)) collapsing meaningful distinctions

name: equality_axiom_derives_false_if_distinct
reason: if any instance exists where the LHS and RHS of tla_forall_always_implies_equality2 are intensionally distinct (which is expected for different closure constructions), the external_body axiom forces equality and derives false — a direct soundness hole
